screens.prompt:
Title: Lucas Santana Portfolio - Hero Section
Context: A premium, recruiter-focused personal portfolio website for Lucas Santana, a Senior Software Engineer, featuring a neo-dark cinematic aesthetic.
Description of the screen: The hero section of the portfolio. Features a graphite (#1C1C1C) background with a subtle cinematic noise texture. An expressive, large serif headline for 'Lucas Santana' and 'Senior Software Engineer' in cyan (#00FFFF). Includes a high-quality profile portrait placeholder on the right with a soft amber (#FFBF00) rim light effect. Subtle technical mono accents (e.g., coordinates, version numbers) in the corners. A clear 'Download Resume' CTA button with a glowing cyan border. variant 1 of 1
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.title: Lucas Santana Portfolio - Hero Section

screens.prompt:
Title: Portfolio - Metrics & Projects
Context: A premium, recruiter-focused personal portfolio website for Lucas Santana, a Senior Software Engineer, featuring a neo-dark cinematic aesthetic.
Description of the screen: The middle section of the portfolio landing page. It showcases high-impact metrics in a clean, bento-style grid: '40% Workflow Efficiency', '40% Incident Response Improvement', '25% Reliability Gain', and '100k+ MAU Support'. Below this, a 'Featured Projects' section with large, high-contrast cards. Each card has a hover effect that reveals technical details in a monospace font. A 'Deep-Dive Case Study' teaser follows, using a cinematic wide-angle layout with a teaser image of a complex architecture diagram. Graphite base with amber accents for highlights. variant 1 of 1
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop

Title: Portfolio - Experience & Contact
Context: A premium, recruiter-focused personal portfolio website for Lucas Santana, a Senior Software Engineer, featuring a neo-dark cinematic aesthetic.
Description of the screen: The final section of the portfolio landing page. An 'Experience Timeline' featuring a vertical line in cyan with amber dots for each milestone. Each entry includes company name, role, and key achievements in clean sans-serif typography. The footer/contact CTA is a bold 'Let\'s Build Something Exceptional' headline with a minimalist contact form or direct email button. The background is deep graphite with a subtle radial amber glow behind the CTA. variant 1 of 1

screens.title: Portfolio - Experience & Contact

outputComponents.text:
The designs for Lucas Santana's senior software engineering portfolio have been generated:

- **Hero Section**: A high-impact opening featuring a cinematic graphite background, bold cyan typography for his name and title, and an amber-lit profile area with technical mono accents.
- **Metrics & Projects**: A data-driven middle section using a bento-grid layout to highlight efficiency and reliability gains, followed by a sleek gallery of featured projects and a case study teaser.
- **Experience & Contact**: A clean, vertical timeline of Lucas's career trajectory, concluding with a premium "Let's Build Something Exceptional" call-to-action area with subtle radial amber lighting.

Would you like to adjust the intensity of the cinematic effects or perhaps see a detailed layout for one of the case study pages?

outputComponents.suggestion: Create a detailed project case study page.
Add a tech stack section with logos and proficiency bars.
Switch to a high-contrast white and cobalt blue theme.
